page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pipeline for the annotation of de-novo generated transcriptomes. It executes BLAST analysis with UniProt, NCBI Conserved Domain Database and Nucleotide divisions, Gene Ontology, UniPathways and the Enzyme Commission
